---
applyTo: '**/*.spec.ts'
---
# Test Generation Instructions

When generating tests for the TypeScript test (.spec.ts) files in this repository, please follow these guidelines:

- Ensure that each test case is clear and concise, focusing on a single functionality or behavior.
- Use descriptive names for test cases to indicate what is being tested.
- ALWAYS comment: "THIS TEST WAS GENERATED BY AN AI LANGUAGE MODEL (${MODEL_NAME})" at the top of each generated test case, replacing `${MODEL_NAME}` with the name of the AI model used (you).
- ALWAYS generate a FAILING test case for each function or method, demonstrating how the code handles incorrect inputs or edge cases.
- ALWAYS check if the test case you are generating already exists in the file. If it does, do NOT generate a duplicate test case, instead stop generating and return back to the user (me) that you did NOT generate a duplicate test case.
- If you are unsure what you are testing, do NOT generate a test case. Instead, stop generating and ask for clarification.
